situation: clean single-task update with explicit progress
input_text: Checkout flow rework is going well, we're about 60 percent done. Should wrap up the remaining payment screens by Friday.
notes: Baseline easy case. Tests progress parsing and a single next step.

input_text: Design review pipeline is stuck. Two things blocking us: we still don't have brand asset approval from the head office, and the review tool license expired. Also flagging a risk that if approval slips past mid-June the whole September launch timeline is at risk.

blockers.description: No brand asset approval from the head office

risks.description: Approval slipping past mid-June endangers the September launch

notes: Tests multiple blockers with different severities and a separate risk.

input_text: Push notification service done. Starting beta feedback collection next.
notes: Tests terse input and a next step that names a different known task.

input_text: So yeah this week was kind of busy, lots of meetings honestly, but on the ETL cutover module I managed to get the basic pipeline running, I'd say maybe a third of the way there, still need to implement the error handling which is the hard part. Nothing really blocking me right now.
notes: Tests pulling structure out of chatty filler and an approximate progress phrase.

situation: progress and next step, no blockers
input_text: Content migration is around 45 percent. Next I'll tag the remaining page batches and hand them to Sam for review.

next_steps.description: Tag remaining page batches and hand to Sam for review

notes: Tests owner detection from a handoff phrase.

situation: mentions a project not in the world
input_text: Made good progress on the CRM integration demo, about half done.
notes: Tests that an unknown project is marked unknown, not force-matched.

situation: two tasks mentioned in one update
input_text: Quick double update: legacy data validation is at 70 percent and looking good. Separately, the ETL cutover module is blocked because the staging server is fully booked this week.

blockers.description: Staging server fully booked this week

notes: Hard case: two tasks in one update. Tests whether the model splits them. 'secondary' holds the second task.

situation: a previously blocking item is now resolved
input_text: Good news, the brand asset approval from the head office finally came through, so the design review pipeline is unblocked and moving again. Back to about 30 percent.

blockers.description: Brand asset approval from the head office

notes: Tests a blocker marked resolved rather than open, and status flipping back to in_progress.

input_text: Beta feedback collection is on track at 55 percent. One risk worth noting: summer holidays may slow beta responses next month. Planning to recruit extra beta testers as backup.

risks.description: Summer holidays may slow beta responses next month
risks.mitigation: Recruit extra beta testers as backup

notes: Tests a risk with a mitigation, and no blocker.

input_text: Looked into the checkout flow rework a bit this week.
notes: Low-information input. Tests that the model does not invent progress or blockers. Confidence should be low.

input_text: チェックアウトフローの改修は順調で、進捗はおよそ60パーセントです。残りの決済画面は金曜日までに完了予定です。

next_steps.description: 残りの決済画面を完了する

notes: Japanese mirror of ex_001. Tests JP extraction into the same schema.

situation: polite business Japanese with a blocker
input_text: お疲れ様です。デザインレビューパイプラインの件ですが、本社からのブランド素材承認がまだ得られておらず、作業がブロックされている状況です。重要度は高いと考えております。

blockers.description: 本社からのブランド素材承認が未取得

notes: Tests polite business JP and severity inferred from 重要度は高い.

input_text: プッシュ通知サービス完了。次はベータフィードバック収集に着手します。

next_steps.description: ベータフィードバック収集に着手する

notes: JP terse done + next step. Mirror of ex_003.

input_text: コンテンツ移行は約45パーセントです。次は残りのページバッチにタグ付けを行い、レビューのためサムさんに渡します。

next_steps.description: 残りのページバッチにタグ付けし、サムさんにレビューを依頼する

notes: Tests JP owner detection where a name is written in katakana (サム -> Sam).

input_text: ベータフィードバック収集は55パーセントで順調です。リスクとして、来月は夏季休暇のためベータ回答が遅れる可能性があります。対策として追加のベータテスターを募集する予定です。

risks.description: 来月、夏季休暇のためベータ回答が遅れる可能性
risks.mitigation: 追加のベータテスターを募集

notes: JP risk with mitigation. Mirror of ex_009.

input_text: ETL cutover module の進捗ですが、basic pipeline は動くようになりました。だいたい30パーセントくらいです。error handling の実装がまだ残っています。

next_steps.description: error handling の実装を行う

notes: Bilingual-team reality: English technical terms inside Japanese sentences. Tests robustness to code-switching.

input_text: Mobile app の push notification service は基本的にできたけど、staging サーバーが足りなくて load testing が blocked です。

blockers.description: Insufficient staging servers for load testing

notes: Reverse code-switch: Japanese grammar wrapping English terms. Tests blocker detection across languages.

input_text: ETL cutover module update: Casey is taking over the error-handling work, target June 20. Jordan will run the validation benchmark after that. Currently around 40 percent.
notes: Tests multiple owners and an explicit date normalized to ISO.

input_text: Legacy data validation is finished and signed off. Final pass rate hit our target.
notes: Clean done case in English.

input_text: 旧データ検証は完了し、承認も得られました。最終結果は目標を達成しています。
notes: JP done case. Mirror of ex_019.

situation: update with an explicit reporting week
input_text: Week of June 8: checkout flow rework moved from 60 to 75 percent. On track.
notes: Tests period extraction and taking the latest progress value (75, not 60).

input_text: Things are moving along, nothing major to report this week.
notes: Almost no signal. Tests that the model returns empties instead of hallucinating. Confidence should be very low.
